answer_analysis.description: Analysis of the student's response and whether it demonstrates knowledge of the information.

outcome.description: Whether the student's answer is correct, incorrect, or partial (on the right track but incomplete). 'partial' is only valid on attempt 1.

potential_underlying_reasoning.description: Brief explanation (up to two sentences) of why the answer is correct. Empty string if not applicable.

potential_problem_context.description: One sentence of useful context about the problem itself. Empty string if not applicable.

potential_student_answer_context.description: Brief context about the student's incorrect answer (one to two sentences). Empty string if the student was correct or if not applicable.

potential_mnemonic_tool.description: A mnemonic device to help the student remember the information. Empty string if not applicable.

tutor_feedback.description: The final feedback message to send to the student, synthesizing the above fields.
